heading: Monitor Your Progress
body:
These are a few possible methods to observe high disk I/O:

- The disk IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second) use from the **Disk IOPS** graph in the
  cluster metrics exceeds the
  provisioned IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second) from the Atlas cluster
  configuration page.

- The **Normalized System CPU**
  metric
  has a high **IOWait** curve. IOWait measures the percentage
  of time the CPU is idle and waiting for an I/O operation to complete.
  The **Normalized System CPU** chart is located under the
  **Hardware Metrics** section of the **Metrics** tab.
